summary.compositionGateDetails: Desktop and mobile header compositions both match Figma. Desktop shows a compact horizontal dark rounded bar with logo left, utility row (search + SEP link) top-right, and nav items bottom-right. Mobile shows SEP button above a compact dark bar with logo left and hamburger icon right. All major elements are in correct positions with correct relative sizes.
summary.reRunContext: Re-run (round 6) after 3 fixes: (1) hover color changed from neon-green to accent, (2) CTA hover effect added (opacity transition), (3) search icon/placeholder made visible in PHP frontend. Previous status: PASS with 0 issues.

fixVerification.description: Nav item hover color changed from neon-green to accent
fixVerification.details: HeaderMainItem.php uses 'hover:text-accent' and 'aria-expanded:text-accent' on both simple links (line 44) and submenu buttons (line 53). HeaderMainItem.tsx uses 'hover:text-accent' on Link (line 120) and button (line 129), with 'text-accent' for active state (line 131). HeaderMainSubItem.php uses 'hover:text-accent' on ThemeLink (line 17). All instances now use the theme-aware accent token instead of hardcoded neon-green. The accent color defaults to neon-green (#d4ff45) via CSS custom property but will adapt when a different color theme class is applied.

HeaderMain.php desktop SEP link (line 102) has 'transition-opacity hover:opacity-60'. Mobile SEP button (line 35) has 'transition-opacity hover:opacity-60'. HeaderMain.tsx desktop SEP link (line 674) and mobile SEP button (line 532) both have matching hover opacity classes. TSX and PHP are in sync.

fixVerification.description: Search icon and placeholder text made visible in PHP frontend
fixVerification.details: Desktop search button (line 79) now has 'text-white' class so the SearchIcon.svg using currentColor renders white on dark background. SVG is wrapped in <span class='w-[19.2px] h-[19.2px] block'> (line 82) matching the TSX sizing. Search input placeholder (line 88) uses 'text-white uppercase placeholder:text-white/60'. Mobile search button (line 151) and mobile toggle button (line 115) also have 'text-white' for consistent SVG rendering. Implementation screenshot confirms search icon and 'SEARCH' placeholder text are visible in the desktop utility row.

details.description: Overall desktop composition matches Figma. Compact horizontal dark bar with: logo (bee icon) left-aligned, utility row (search form + vertical separator + SEP link) top-right, navigation items (ABOUT, HEALTH, FINANCIAL WELLBEING, ADVOCACY, SOCIAL, STUDENT VOICES) bottom-right.
Nav bar background: bg-charcoal (#1f1f1d) vs Figma #1e1e1c. 1-unit RGB difference, imperceptible and within tolerance.
Nav bar rounded corners: rounded-[25px]. Matches Figma exactly.
Nav bar padding: px-8 (32px) py-4 (16px). Figma: px-32 py-16. Exact match.
Nav items: General Sans Medium 16px uppercase white leading-[1.16]. Matches Figma exactly.
Search form: 250px width, border-b border-white, search icon (19.2px, white) + placeholder text 'SEARCH' visible. Figma: 250px, border-b, search icon + 'SEARCH' text. Match confirmed.
Search placeholder: General Sans Medium 14px uppercase white. Figma: 14px General Sans Medium uppercase white. Exact match.
SEP link: 'STUDENT ENGAGEMENT PLATFORM' with external arrow icon, Roboto Medium 16px uppercase. Matches Figma.
Vertical separator between search and SEP: w-px white line. Matches Figma.
Gap between utility row and nav row: gap-6 (24px). Figma: gap-24. Exact match.
Gap between nav items: gap-8 (32px). Figma: gap-32. Exact match.
Logo properly constrained. max-h-[58px] matches Figma's 57.685px logo height (0.315px difference, within tolerance).
Nav item hover uses text-accent (theme-aware, defaults to neon-green #d4ff45). Matches Figma active state color confirmed at node 1417:2397.
SEP link hover: transition-opacity hover:opacity-60 provides visible hover feedback.
Overall mobile composition matches Figma. SEP button (rounded-full, bg-charcoal) above compact nav bar with logo and hamburger menu icon.

SEP mobile button: bg-charcoal, rounded-full, p-4 (16px), gap-3, text-white uppercase + ExternalArrow.svg. Figma: rounded-[119px] p-16 gap-11.9px. Match confirmed (rounded-full=9999px effectively equivalent to 119px pill shape).
Gap between SEP button and nav bar: gap-2 (8px). Figma: gap-8. Exact match.
Logo properly constrained on mobile. max-h-[26px] matches Figma's 25.599px (0.401px difference, within tolerance).
Mobile toggle (hamburger) icon visible, correctly positioned right side of nav bar. md:hidden, proper aria attributes.
Nav bar padding on mobile: px-8 (32px) py-4 (16px). Matches Figma.
Mobile SEP button: transition-opacity hover:opacity-60 provides visible hover feedback.

notes.observation: The test page uses a bee icon (favicon) as the logo image, while the Figma design shows the full IGNITE logo (bee icon + 'IGNITE' wordmark, ~215px wide x ~58px tall). This is a content/upload difference, not a code issue. The code correctly constrains whatever image is uploaded via max-height and object-contain. The full IGNITE logo should be uploaded for production use.

contentResilienceVerification.details: Logo has proper CSS constraints (max-h-[58px] desktop, max-h-[26px] mobile, object-contain) ensuring the header maintains correct proportions regardless of uploaded image aspect ratio. Search icon uses currentColor with text-white on parent for theme compatibility. SVG assets (SearchIcon, ExternalArrow, ChevronDown, MainMenuOpen/Close) all use currentColor for proper rendering on the dark background.

syncVerification.details: TSX and PHP are in sync for all checked components. Hover classes (text-accent, hover:opacity-60), search icon sizing (19.2px), SVG color handling (text-white + currentColor), and logo constraints (max-h-[58px] / max-h-[26px]) all match between editor and frontend templates.
